About This Experience

What Is Included
    Ground transport within Port Antonio is included. Transport outside Port Antonio will incur additional fees. Please contact us before booking if you are not within Port Antonio.
    What to Bring
      Cancellation Policy
      48 hours or more before departure
      Full refund. No cancellation fee.
      24 to 48 hours before departure
      50% of the total booking value retained.
      Less than 24 hours or same day
      No refund. 100% non-refundable.
      How to cancel
      Email booking@amiyatours.com. Must be confirmed by Amiya Tours to be valid.
      Frequently Asked Questions
      What is the minimum group size?
      Most tours require a minimum of 2 guests. The Group Celebration Ultimate requires a minimum of 4 persons.
      Is transport included?
      Ground transport within Port Antonio is included on all tours. For pickups outside Port Antonio please contact us before booking.
      Can I customise my experience?
      Yes. Every Amiya experience can be personalised. Let us know your occasion and any special requests in the booking form.
      What if weather affects my tour?
      All experiences are subject to prevailing weather and natural conditions. Amiya Tours will offer a full credit or reschedule option where applicable.
      You May Also Enjoy

      This experience is arranged personally by your Amiya host. Please contact us to discuss your vision and begin planning.
